name: Pete Stauber
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $254,846 for Pete Stauber in U.S. House, MN-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
